cases.title: Enforce retention and erasure periods for personal data
cases.fullText: Enforce retention and erasure periods for personal data. Every system that stores personal data must be able to delete or anonymise it once the defined retention period ends (storage limitation).

cases.title: Protect integrity and confidentiality of personal data
cases.fullText: Protect integrity and confidentiality of personal data. Personal data must be processed with technical and organisational measures ensuring integrity and confidentiality.

cases.title: Capture and manage a lawful basis (e.g. consent) for each processing activity
cases.fullText: Capture and manage a lawful basis (e.g. consent) for each processing activity. The system that manages user identity must record and enforce a lawful basis (consent, contract) for processing personal data.

cases.title: Provide data subjects access to their personal data on request
cases.fullText: Provide data subjects access to their personal data on request. Each system holding personal data must be able to retrieve and export that data for a subject-access request.

cases.fullText: Erase a data subject’s personal data on request. Each system holding personal data must support deletion of an individual’s data without undue delay.

cases.title: Propagate erasure to downstream and replicated stores
cases.fullText: Propagate erasure to downstream and replicated stores. An erasure request must reach all replicated / downstream stores that hold copies of the personal data.

cases.title: Apply a transfer mechanism for third-country data transfers
cases.fullText: Apply a transfer mechanism for third-country data transfers. Personal data sent to processors outside the EU/adequacy area must be covered by a valid transfer mechanism.
